Container.Name: influxdb-mcp-server
Container.Overview: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for InfluxDB v2 OSS. Exposes InfluxDB query and management tools over Streamable HTTP so AI assistants (Claude, etc.) can interact with your InfluxDB instance. Designed to sit behind mcp-edge-gateway for authentication.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Host port to expose the MCP server on. Map this in your mcp-edge-gateway upstream URL.

Config.Name: InfluxDB Token
Config.Description: InfluxDB all-access or scoped API token. Find this in your InfluxDB UI under Load Data > API Tokens.

Config.Name: InfluxDB URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your InfluxDB instance, including protocol and port.

Config.Name: InfluxDB Org
Config.Description: InfluxDB organization name (found in your InfluxDB UI).
